verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faro' kiangah pai-in ama tungah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theihna dingin ka mite paisak in
Ahih hangin amaute na paisak kei leh, en in, na gam khempeuh uiphukte tawh ka gimsak ding hi

Nail gun pen uiphukte tawh kidim ding a, tuate pen na innsung, na lupna inndei sung, na lupna tung, na nasemte leh na mipihte' innsung, na meikhukte leh na annel mekna kuang sung uhah hong pai ding uh hi
Uiphukte, nang' tung leh na nasemte khempeuh tungah hong pai ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Gunte, luite, leh tuilite tungah na ciangkhut zan in la, Egypt leitang tungah uiphukte paisak in,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Aaron in Egypt tuite tungah a khut zan a, uiphukte hong pai-in Egypt leitang a tuam hi
Ahih hangin mitphial siamte in amau' siamna tawh tua bangmah bawl thei uh a, Egypt leitang tungah uiphukte omsak uh hi
Tua ciangin Faro in Moses leh Aaron samin, “Kei leh ka mite' kiang panin uiphukte a lakkhiatna dingin Topa' tungah thum in. Topa' tungah biakna a pia dingin mite ka paisak ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Moses in Faro' kiangah, “Nail gun sung cih simloh, nangma kiang leh na innte panin uiphukte a beina dingin nang leh na nasemte leh na mite-a' dingin ka thum theihna dingin a hun khat seh in,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Zing ciang,” ci hi. Moses in, “ Topa ahi kote' Pasian tawh a kibang kuamah omlo hi, ci-in na theihna dingin nangma cih bang hi ta hen
Nang leh na innte leh na nasemte leh na mite' kiang panin uiphukte paikhia ding uh a, Nail gun sung bekah omlai ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Faro' kiang panin Moses leh Aaron a paikhia uh hi. Faro' tungah a tun'sak uiphukte a beisakna dingin Topa' tungah Moses in thu a ngen hi
Topa in Moses' nget bangin hih a, innte leh huang sung leh lote panin uiphukte a si hi
Amaute in a lomlomin tuate khawm uh a, gamsung teng uih hi
Ahih hangin nopna a omkik lam Faro in a muh ciangin, amah in a lungsim khauhsak a, Topa' gensa bangin amau' thu ngailo hi.
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaron' kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Egypt gamsung khempeuhah thokang a omna dingin na ciangkhut zanin leivui sat in,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Amaute in tua bangmahin hih uh hi. Aaron in a ciangkhut tawh leivui sat a, mihing tung leh ganhing tungah thokang hong om hi. Egypt gamsung khempeuhah leivui teng thokang suak hi
Mitphial siamte in amau' siamna tawh thokang pian'sak ding sin uh a, ahih hangin amaute in hih theilo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mihing leh ganhing tungah thokangte om hi
Mitphial siamte in Faro' kiangah, “Hih pen Pasian' nasepna ahi hi,” ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Faro' lungsim khauh a, Topa' gensa bangin amah in amaute' thu ngailo hi.
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Zingsangin tho baihin gunah Faro hong pai ding ngakin ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theihna dingun ka mite paisak in

Tua bang hiloin, ka mite na paisak kei leh, en in, nang leh na nasemte leh na mite' tung leh na innte sungah tho honpite kong sawl ding hi. Egypt mite' innte leh tuate' din'na leitang zong tho honpite tawh kidim ding hi
Ahih hangin tua ni ciangin kei pen hih leitang tungah Topa ka hihna na theihna dingin tho honpite a omlohna dingin ka mite a ten'na Goshen leitang keimah in ka tuam koih ding hi
Tua bangin keima mite leh nangma mite a kilamdan'na khat ka bawl ding hi. Zing ciangin hih lim hong om ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi
Topa in tua bangmahin hih ahih manin Faro' innsung leh ama nasemte' innsungah tho honpi hong pai a, thote' hangin Egypt gamsung khempeuh leitang kisia hi
Tua ciangin Faro in Moses leh Aaron sam a, “Pai un; hih gam sungah na Pasian tung uhah biakna pia un,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Moses in, “Tua bangin hih ding kituaklo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite-a' dingin a deihhuailo biaknate kote in Topa ka Pasian uh tungah ka pia ding uh hi. Egypt mite-a' dingin a deihhuailo biaknate amau' muhna-ah pia le ung, amaute in suang tawh kote hong deng ding uh hilo ahi hiam
Kote, ni thum paina sehnel gamah pai-in ama hong thupiak ding bangin Topa ka Pasian uh tungah biakna ka va pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Faro in, “Sehnel gamah Topa na Pasian uh tungah biakna a pia dingin note kong paisak ding hi. Ahi zongin gamlapi-ah na pai kei ding uh hi. Kei-a' dingin zong hong thumsak un,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Moses in, “En in, nang kiang panin kei paikhia-in Faro' kiang pan, a nasemte' kiang pan, leh a mite' kiang panin tho honpite zing ciangin a paikhiat theihna dingin Topa' tungah thu ka ngen ding hi. Ahi zongin Topa' tungah biakna a pia dingin mite paisak lohna tawh Faro hong zuautat kik nawn kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Faro' kiang panin Moses paikhia-in Topa' tungah thu a ngen hi
Topa in Moses' nget bangin pia a, Faro' kiang, a nasemte' kiang, leh a mite' kiang panin tho honpite lakhia a, khat zong om nawnlo hi
Ahi zongin Faro in hih hunin zong a lungsim khauhsak lai a, mite paisaklo hi.
